---
title: "Bernadette Aguirre"
name: "Bernadette Aguirre"
image: "/images/profile_pics/bernadette_aguirre.jpg"
research: "**Research subject:** Saliance of trill rate: an experimental test in small tree finches of the Galapagos"
location: "**Research location:** Wyoming"
dates: "**Dates:** 2023"
category: "Alumni"
category_order: "7"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
